steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The decisive phrase is 'all those words derive from the Zoque branch' — this signals that the borrowed words into Maya came from an established Zoque branch during Olmec dominance, which implies divergence had already occurred.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: D directly addresses the divergence of the Zoque branch before Olmec dominance. A and C misread the direction of influence or add unmentioned claims. B incorrectly ties Olmec to Mayan origins. That matches choice D — D is correct.
